title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Axak Group Ltd
body: "Application number 5306  Applicant AXA objected to the name used by Axak Group Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Axak Group Ltd is changed to 16209410, Ltd. "
